upasargachandrika.example_text: 'Anahyate yasya viDUpyate ca pApacyate klidyati cApi nAsA' (suSruta0 236910) viDUpyate bAzpAyate
'parogavyUti hotavyastaTA hEnaM na vyavaDUnute' (kAWaka0 3711) avaDUnotItyarTaH nArTo vinA
'tAni bARasahasrARi carmaRA vyavaDUya' (hari0 3112) vyavaDUya=pratyasya pratikzipya parasparajYAH saMhfzwA vyaDUtAH suniScitAH
'api paYcASataM SUrA mfdnanti mahatIM camUm' (BA0 BIzma0 38283).. vyavaDUtA dArAdizvanAsaktAH
'antarIkzAd vinirDUtAstasya vegena rAkzasAH BUmO nipatitAH…' (rA0 61689) vinirDUtAH parAkziptA utsAritAH parARunnAH
